briefs.title: BC Streamlined Permitting Rules Updated: High-Output Wind and Solar Projects Get Faster Approvals
briefs.summary: BC updated its renewable energy permitting rules on December 15, 2025, creating two tiers of streamlined approvals for wind and solar projects. Wind and solar projects over 5 MW (megawatts — a measure of power output) now qualify for the fastest 'level 3' approval track, while smaller projects and two named transmission line projects use the standard 'level 2' streamlined process.
briefs.action_required: If you develop or invest in wind or solar energy projects over 5 MW in BC, review the new level 3 permitting process.
